DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT DENIED W/O PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT PROOF THAT PAYMENT WAS RECEIVED BY PLTF.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOYAKINS, CHARLES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NIKCHEMNY, ROBERT NIKCHEMNY, VICTORIA NIKCHEMNAYA, STELLA $1,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,800.00, STACY NIKCHEMNY IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF DEFT, STAN KEMP. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BOYAKINS, CHARLES AS TO DEFENDANT NIKCHEMNY, ROBERT NIKCHEMNY, VICTORIA NIKCHEMNAYA, STELLA NIKCHEMNY, STELLA MACHINME, STACY NIKCHEMNY, STACY KEMP, STAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-13-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-13-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TO BE HEARD W/ CASE #'S 794089 AND 704020. STELLA MACHINME IS CORRECTED TO: STELLA NIKCHEMNAYA. STELLA NIKCHEMNY IS DISMISSED W/ PREJUDICE. STACY MACHINME IS DISMISSED W/ PREJUDICE.
